DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-29-2013 Sustained
MINI MINUTES: Judge Richard A. Kramer; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not Reported. (Dept. 303).

Appearances:
Plaintiff, Valerie Gornaia (pro per) is present.

Attorney, Evelina Manukyan representing defendant Wells Fargo Home Mortgage.

This matter comes on calendar for Demurrer to 1st Amended Complaint.

The Court grants Request for Judicial Notice of trustee sale documents.

Counsel submits oral arguments.

Defendant Wells Fargo's Demurrer to First Amended Complaint is SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer is sustained without leave to amend as to 1st cause of action.
Demurrer is overruled as follows (1) as to causes of action 2, 3 and 4, fraud, negligent misrepresentation and CCC 1572 sufficiently alleged; (2) as to 6 cause of action, negligence sufficiently alleged. See paragraph 26; (3) as to 6th cause of action, declaratory relief sufficiently alleged. See paragraph 101(c) and (e).

Defendant shall prepare written order.
